input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.2.1
            TITLE: requirement:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.2.1: Requirement:
T.1.2.1 Requirement: 
a. The cockpit must have a free internal cross section  
b. The template shown below must pass through the cockpit  
 
Template maximum thickness: 7 mm

final_answer: rule T.1.2.1: Requirement: T.1.2.1 Requirement: a. The cockpit must have a free internal cross section b. The template shown below must pass through the cockpit Template maximum thickness: 7 mm
